title: UTIL HUD
body:
New Fabric mod. I'm going to upgrade this mod regularily.

It has button {B} with it you can Go to GUI (Graphical User Interface) And {G} to copy current coordinates. I will keep this mod up for some time and upgrade it. 

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d68e63dffbc1d56c093e8288c065cbf293468ce.png)

Mod features:

Customizable button {B}
Coordinates
Copy coordintes {G}
10 last death locations in GUI {L}
Fullbright 
FPS
Time
GUI

Fabric loader version: 0.16.7 or newer!


Quick guide:

Press B to go to GUI
Press the Toggle HUD to turn the hud on
Then turn on things you want to see on HUD
Lastly configure the positions of the HUDs

Copy your death-coordinates-util-hud.txt path with Button in GUI (Show death locations)

You will have to go then to file explorer and paste the path to search bar or press windows key + R and paste the path there and press enter. You will see the following info:

Tips:

X: 5 & Y: 5 in GUI means the current position of the HUD
Be aware of the last death position that If you died in other world it will show you those coordinates I will update this in future!
Visit regularily curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/utility-mod to see new updates first

Notice: 

If you remove/rename the file called util-hud-config.json, you will have to do things in quick guide again!

-- I will take all feedback and ideas. Fabric mod -- This Mod was programmed by NSI21 --

Support me at: ko-fi.com/nsi21![Util HUD]
